# Re-Up Cannabis Muskogee

Re-Up Muskogee is a premium medical marijuana dispensary located in Muskogee, Oklahoma. We specialize in high-quality flower, concentrates, edibles, and vapes.

## Location & Hours
- **Address:** 29 W Southside Blvd, Muskogee, OK 74401
- **Hours:** Open daily until 10:00 PM
- **Features:** Drive-Thru Available, Medical Only (OMMA Licensed)

## Current Deals & Offers
- **First-Time Patients:** 1g flower, 1000mg edible, or vape cart for 99¢.
- **Referral Bonus:** 500 bonus points for referring a new patient.
- **Daily Deals:**
  - Mon: Medical Monday (20% off flower)
  - Tue: Topical Tuesday (B2G1 50% off)
  - Wed: Wax Wednesday ($10 off extracts)
  - Thu: Throwback Thursday (15% Student/Senior discount)
  - Fri: Fire Friday (BOGO 50% Pre-rolls/Vapes)

## Menu Categories
- Flower (Indica, Sativa, Hybrid, Muskogee Homegrown)
- Concentrates (Live Resin, Wax, Shatter)
- Edibles (Gummies, Chocolates, 1000mg+ specialties)
- Vapes (Full Spectrum, Distillate)
- Pre-Rolls
- Gear & Glass

## Important Note
Must have a valid Oklahoma Medical Marijuana Authority (OMMA) patient license to purchase.
